headline: H.C. Wainwright and Wells Fargo Lift MannKind (MNKD) Price Targets
summary: MannKind Corporation (NASDAQ:MNKD) is one of the 10 Best US Stocks Under $5 to Buy. On May 7, H.C. Wainwright increased its price target on MannKind Corporation (NASDAQ:MNKD) from $8 to $10 and kept its Buy rating on the stock. The research firm noted that MannKind Corporation’s (NASDAQ:MNKD) first-quarter results came in below expectations, but […]

headline: Is Wells Fargo (WFC) Offering Opportunity After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: Wondering whether Wells Fargo at around US$75.64 is offering value or just pricing in past gains? This article walks through what the current share price may be implying about the stock. The share price has pulled back recently, with the stock down about 4.5% over the past week and down roughly 11.4% over the last month, even though the 1 year return sits at about 3.2% and the 3 year return is roughly 110.3%. Recent headlines around Wells Fargo have focused on its position among large US...

headline: Firm Led by Ex-Wells Fargo Execs Recruits $1 Billion Advisor Team From Wells Fargo
summary: The firm, known as &Partners, has been steadily recruiting dozens of advisor teams since its founding three years ago.

headline: Verizon’s Worldwide Hybrid Bond Sale Drive Hits $12 Billion

headline: Trimble Stock: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
